CT ORDER FOLL'G JUDGMENT: - JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR RESTITN & POSSESSN OF PREMISES KNOWN AS 905 COLUMBUS AVENUE #115 IN SAN FRANCISCO; - RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED; - MONEY JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR $833.52 CONSTIT'G BACK RENT & DAILY DAMAGES; - NO AWARD OF ATNY FEES; - COSTS PER COST BILL TO BE SUBMITTED. JUDGMENT TO BE PREPARED BY PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCULOUGH, FRANCIS J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 905 COLUMBUS AVENUE #115, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $833.52 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $833.52, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL TO BE SUBMITTED.
